title: Improve invoice print view and redesign login screen

requirements.summary: Remove 'Amount Paid' and 'Pending Amount' fields from the printed invoice in InvoicePrintView, keeping only the Final Amount and amount-in-words line in the GST summary section
acceptanceCriteria: The printed invoice does not display an 'Amount Paid' row or field.
The printed invoice does not display a 'Pending Amount' row or field.
The Final Amount row remains present and clearly visible in the GST summary section.
The amount-in-words line (e.g. 'Rupees X Only') continues to appear below the Final Amount on the printed view.
All other invoice content (header, party name, GST No., invoice number, bill date, line items table, Base Amount, CGST, SGST, Round-off, footer) is unchanged.

file_operations.description: Remove the 'Amount Paid' and 'Pending Amount' rows from the GST summary section of the print layout. Keep the Final Amount row and the amount-in-words line below it. Do not alter any other elements including the header, party details, line items table, Base Amount, CGST, SGST, Round-off rows, or footer.

requirements.summary: Enhance the visual design, typography, spacing, and professional appearance of InvoicePrintView while preserving the red-and-white color theme and existing structural layout
acceptanceCriteria: The printed invoice uses improved spacing, font sizing, and typographic hierarchy compared to the current version.
The red header band, white body background, red accent borders, and red 'MANISH INFRATECH' typography are preserved.
The MI logo (red/white square with 'MI' initials) continues to appear in the top-left corner of the header.
The line item table columns (Sr. No., HSN Code, Product Name, Qty, Unit, Rate ₹, Amount ₹) are unchanged.
The GST summary section columns and row labels are unchanged.
The overall invoice looks professional and aesthetically refined when printed or previewed.

file_operations.description: Improve the print layout's visual design by refining typography (font sizes, weights, letter spacing), enhancing spacing (padding, margins, line heights), and polishing the overall aesthetic. Preserve the existing red-and-white color scheme (red header band, white body, red accent borders on GST summary, red 'MANISH INFRATECH' typography). Ensure the MI logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/mi-logo.dim_128x128.png remains in the top-left corner of the header. Do not change the structural columns of the line items table or GST summary rows.

requirements.summary: Redesign SimpleLoginScreen with improved professional aesthetics using brand colors (red, white, navy), displaying MI logo and 'MANISH INFRATECH' branding, with clean card layout for username/PIN fields while preserving all authentication logic
acceptanceCriteria: The login screen displays a visually polished card or panel with the MI logo and 'MANISH INFRATECH' branding at the top.
Username and PIN fields are clearly labeled with readable dark text and proper spacing.
The login button uses brand colors (red or navy background with white text) and has a professional appearance.
An inline error message is shown in red/visible color for invalid credentials.
Successful login with MANISHINFRATECH / 1752 grants access to the app and stores the session in localStorage.
No change to authentication logic, credentials, or session management behavior.

file_operations.description: Redesign the login screen with a professional card-based layout. Display the MI logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/mi-logo.dim_128x128.png and 'MANISH INFRATECH' branding prominently at the top. Style the username and PIN input fields with clear labels, readable dark text, and adequate spacing. Style the login button with brand colors (red or navy background, white text). Show inline error messages in red/visible color for invalid credentials. Use the existing useSimpleAuth hook without modifying authentication logic, hardcoded credentials (MANISHINFRATECH/1752), or session management behavior.
